description_long: This street light features a tall, slender, metallic pole with a hexagonal base for stability. At the top, two long, straight arms extend horizontally in opposite directions, each supporting a rectangular, box-shaped lamp head. The lamp heads are modern in style, with flat surfaces and no visible decorative elements, likely housing LED fixtures for efficient illumination. The pole itself is plain and unadorned, emphasizing functionality over ornamentation. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for wide roadways or intersections where broad, even lighting coverage is required. The structure appears robust and weather-resistant, intended for permanent installation in urban environments.
description: A tall, dual-arm street light with a plain metal pole and two modern, rectangular lamp heads extending horizontally. The design is functional and minimal, ideal for urban streets or intersections.
description_view_0: Front view showing both horizontal arms and lamp heads clearly, with the pole and base visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the pole and the narrow width of the lamp heads.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying both arms and lamp heads symmetrically.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the alignment of the lamp heads.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Rectangular, box-shaped, modern lamp heads with flat surfaces and no visible decorative elements or diffusers.
